title: NDIC MD Pays Condolence Visit to Late President Yar’adua’s Family - FinancialEDGE
description: The Managing Director/Chief Executive of the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), Bello Hassan, led a delegation on a condolence visit to the family of late President Musa Yar'adua in Katsina, Katsina State. html:
The Managing Director/Chief Executive of the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), Bello Hassan, led a delegation on a condolence visit to the family of late President Musa Yar’adua in Katsina, Katsina State.

The visit was to commiserate with the family over the loss of Hajia Aya Dada Musa, a family matriarch.

During the visit, Hassan was received by Senator Abdul-Aziz Yar’adua, Dan Madamin Katsina, and Hakimin Dandara, Alhaji Usman Nagogo.

The NDIC MD offered his heartfelt condolences to the family, acknowledging the significant impact of Hajia Aya’s passing.
